creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
The www/rubygem-passenger port fails to package if the SYMLINK option is set.

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for rubygem-passenger-4.0.50
pkg-static: lstat(/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger/work/stage/usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/1.9/gems/passenger): No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger
====>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for rubygem-passenger-4.0.50
build of /usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger ended at Tue Sep 16 20:09:28 UTC 2014
build time: 00:03:09
!!! build failure encountered !!!
